notes: Funding rate is a perp-specific payment between longs and shorts every 8h on Binance.
Canonical 1m parquets do not carry funding data; we use a defensible proxy:
computed on the 1h timeframe over a rolling 1-week window (168 bars).
The proxy captures persistent one-sided drift in closes (longs or shorts over-leveraged).
Entry: funding z-score |z| > 2σ AND price touches the VPVR value-area band (±5% of VAH/VAL).
Exit: 4-bar time stop OR funding normalization (|z|<0.5) OR 2% stop loss.
Direction: long+short (bidirectional). Universe: BTCUSDT perp only (most liquid).
